creator: freebsd-ports@charlieroot.de
text:
These releases address regressions, that were introduced with previous security releases.
These versions are maintenance releases and contain bug fixes only.

For details about the releases, please see:

https://get.typo3.org/release-notes/11.5.21
https://typo3.org/article/typo3-1213-11521-and-10434-maintenance-releases-published
